mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.id_card, u.password, u.name, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.last_password_reset_time, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.is_deleted, u.created_at, u.updated_at
mapper.select:
select
, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code from sys_users u left join sys_user_roles ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.id = #{id} and u.is_deleted = 0

select
, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code from sys_users u left join sys_user_roles ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.username = #{username}

select
, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code from sys_users u left join sys_user_roles ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.id_card = #{idCard}

select
, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code from sys_users u left join sys_user_roles ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where (u.username = #{account} or u.id_card = #{account}) and u.is_deleted = 0

select
, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code from sys_users u left join sys_user_roles ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.is_deleted = 0
and u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.status = #{status}
and exists (select 1 from sys_user_roles where user_id = u.id and role_id = #{roleId})
order by u.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_users (username, id_card, password, name, avatar, email, phone, status) values (#{username}, #{idCard}, #{password}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sys_users set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
update sys_users set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update sys_users set password = #{password}, last_password_reset_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
